meaning: n.办理,处理,会报,学报,交易,事务,处理事务
examples: The transaction is completed by payment of the fee.
Neither side would disclose details of the transaction.
The new device can also cancel the cheque after the transaction is complete.
This transaction will provide a stronger hand in the high-stakes game of global smartphones.
This is about more than simply a financial transaction, one company taking over another.
